zh.lifeSummary: 當Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan於大約1050年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾時，她的父親Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale17歲，母親Anne ferch Cadwgan17歲。她於大約1070年與Uchdrud ab Edwin結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Montgomeryshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan于大约1050年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾时，她的父亲Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale17岁，母亲Anne ferch Cadwgan17岁。她于大约1070年与Uchdrud ab Edwin结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Nest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

en.lifeSummary: When Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan was born about 1050, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale, was 17 and her mother, Anne ferch Cadwgan, was 17. She married Uchdrud ab Edwin about 1070. They were the parents of at least 6 sons.

fr.of Main, Meifod, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Meifod, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan est née environ 1050, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Anne ferch Cadwgan, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Uchdrud ab Edwin environ 1070. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan um 1050 in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale 17 und ihre Mutter Anne ferch Cadwgan 17. Sie hat um 1070 Uchdrud ab Edwin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan è nata il circa 1050 nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Anne ferch Cadwgan, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Uchdrud ab Edwin circa 1070. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychanが約1050年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yaleは17歳，母Anne ferch Cadwganは17歳であった。約1070年にUchdrud ab Edwinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan(이)가 대략 1050년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne ferch Cadwgan(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1070년 Uchdrud ab Edwin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan nasceu aproximadamente 1050, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Anne ferch Cadwgan, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Uchdrud ab Edwin aproximadamente 1070. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan родилась около 1050 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne ferch Cadwgan, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Uchdrud ab Edwin около 1070 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan nació aproximadamente 1050, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Anne ferch Cadwgan, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Uchdrud ab Edwin aproximadamente 1070. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos.
